commands.repair_reason: - No automated repair is needed; the protected maintainer label and overlapping Discord progress PRs call for human merge-order review and final merge-head validation.; Cleared: The diff only changes Discord TypeScript runtime/tests and uses an existing SDK formatter; it does not touch workflows, dependencies, lockfiles, secrets, or package execution paths. (sha=69467284a4fcece5a41ce11237e1dd3c23484929)
commands.review_summary:
The branch stops pre-formatting Discord reasoning stream payloads before draft-preview merging, formats the merged reasoning line for display, tightens Thinking snapshot detection, and adds Discord progress regressions.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +85. Total +86 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main preformats each Discord reasoning callback before a merge helper that treats Thinking/Reasoning-prefixed input as a snapshot, and the PR adds a direct delta regression for that path.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; the protected maintainer label and overlapping Discord progress PRs call for human merge-order review and final merge-head validation.

target.title: fix(discord): accumulate reasoning progress deltas
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #83983.

Discord progress-mode reasoning updates were formatting each reasoning callback with the display `Thinking...` wrapper before draft-preview merge logic saw it. Since the merge logic treats `Thinking...`/`Reasoning:` prefixed text as a full snapshot, Codex app-server delta chunks like `"Considering"`, `" plugin"`, `" installation"`, `"!"` could replace each other until only the final tiny chunk remained visible.

This keeps reasoning stream payloads raw until `pushReasoningProgress()` merges delta/snapshot semantics, then applies the existing reasoning display formatter once for the stable progress line. The follow-up also tightens the `Thinking` snapshot detector so raw reasoning text that naturally starts with `Thinking` is preserved and appended instead of being stripped or treated as a replacement snapshot.

No config surface or plugin surface changes.

## Proof

```sh
OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts --reporter=dot
# Test Files 1 passed (1)
# Tests 89 passed (89)

./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.draft-preview.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts
# All matched files use the correct format.

./node_modules/.bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.draft-preview.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts
# Found 0 warnings and 0 errors.

git diff --check origin/main...HEAD
# passed

git diff --check
# passed

/home/giodl/.local/toolchains/node-v22.22.3-linux-x64/bin/codex review --base origin/main
# No actionable regressions in the touched Discord progress-draft path.
```

Rebased onto current `main` (`53812bd8aa686dec530a5d5d924a01fe4384fd50`). Signed head: `69467284a4fcece5a41ce11237e1dd3c23484929`.
